summary: SO reports Q4 2025 earnings on Feb 19, 2026 - within the resolution window (Feb 17 to Feb 28). Analysts expect EPS of $0.56 (up 12% YoY) and revenue of $6.86B (up 8.3%). Last quarter beat EPS estimates by 5.96%.
content: Southern Company Q4 2025 earnings release: Feb 19, 2026. EPS estimate $0.56, revenue $6.86B. Previous quarter (Q3 2025) beat by 5.96%. Stock recently rallied ~9% in the past month approaching the earnings date. The stock is near its 52-week high (94.95 vs 100.84). This earnings report is a significant catalyst that could move the stock materially in either direction during the resolution window.
